description:
Legal document in Arabic script. Dated: 551 H = 1156/57 CE. Fragment (left side). Mentions Cairo (al-Qāhira al-maḥrūsa). Mentions the names Muḥammad b. Ibrāhīm and Yūsuf the Ṣūfī (al-mutasawwif). Needs examination.

Reused on verso for Arabic pen trials and Hebrew jotting from the Song of Songs 2:9.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
